hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM 2 on synthetic liquid phase transmission electron microscopy video data will produce a segmentation model (SAM-EM) that achieves superior real-time nanoparticle tracking accuracy compared to a U-Net baseline across varying signal-to-noise conditions, because SAM 2's video object segmentation architecture with temporal memory enables more robust propagation of particle identities through frames with overlaps and low contrast than single-frame convolutional approaches.
